news.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

news.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

news.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.

news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.

news.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads

news.title: A.I. Is Lifting Markets and the Economy and Raising Risks for Both
news.description: [THE NEW YORK TIMES] Investment in artificial intelligence and related companies is lifting the stock market and spending across the economy.

news.title: With The Rise Of Agentic, Has SaaS Seen Its Moment?
news.description: [FORBES] Agentic AI is fundamentally reshaping the Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) model, moving value from application usage to autonomous agent-completed actions.

news.title: Survey: Gap exists between students, educators when it comes to using, understanding AI
news.description: [SALT LAKE CITY DESERET NEWS] From K-12 to higher education, a significant gap exists when it comes to students' and teachers' incorporation of artificial intelligence.

news.title: Punjab AI education: state introduces AI as mainstream subject from Class 1 to 12
news.description: [INDIA TODAY] The Punjab government introduced Artificial Intelligence (AI) as a mainstream subject from Classes 1 to 12 under the 'Sarbat.AI' project, with Education Minister Harjot Singh Bains saying the state is the first in the country to do so.
